opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My bottom is constantly leaking this foul-smelling fluid, and now it's swollen and hurts too much to sit.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been leaking for months but over the last couple of days the area has become really swollen, red and painful and I can't sit down.

symptom_narrative.onset: the leaking started about 3 months ago; the swelling, redness and pain flared up badly over the last 2 days
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 months of on-and-off leaking, with a bad flare in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: a small opening near my back passage that leaks smelly fluid, sometimes with a bit of blood in it; now the area around it is swollen, red and sore
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is bad enough that I can't sit down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right next to my back passage / around my bottom
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the leaking comes and goes, but the last couple of days it's been constantly sore and swollen
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: standing up or lying on my side is more comfortable; the paracetamol takes the edge off a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting down makes it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the leaking has actually slowed down over the last two days while the swelling got worse; I've felt a bit warm
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: about 6 months ago I had a painful lump near my bottom that burst and drained by itself
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sit properly, and keeping the area clean is really distressing me

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a painful lump near my back passage about 6 months ago that burst and drained on its own
past_medical_history.how_managed: it drained by itself, I didn't have anything done to it

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a small opening near my back passage that has been leaking on and off for a few months

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: very distressed about managing the leaking and hygiene; using sanitary pads to soak it up

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer; borderline and technique-dependent

objective_data_offered.value: a small opening in the skin near my back passage that leaks smelly fluid, with the skin around it looking swollen and red
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video view only; depth, tract and any deeper collection cannot be assessed on camera

objective_data_offered.value: about 85 kg on my home scales
